ABOUT US

HOME |ABOUT US

BRAND STORY

DTU wasn't born in a design studio; it was born on the factory floor of Duc Thanh Garment. For over two decades, our hands have been dedicated to the most demanding garments in the world-medical scrubs that must endure long shifts and workwear that must withstand the toughest conditions. We learned that a single stitch could be the difference between discomfort and confidence. We mastered the sewing of clothing before we ever touched the "art" of it.

BRAND STORY

DTU wasn't born in a design studio; it was born on the factory floor of Duc Thanh Garment. For over two decades, our hands have been dedicated to the most demanding garments in the world-medical scrubs that must endure long shifts and workwear that must withstand the toughest conditions. We learned that a single stitch could be the difference between discomfort and confidence. We mastered the sewing of clothing before we ever touched the "art" of it.

Highlight our 5 specialized factories and a team of over 4,000 skilled professionals.

MATERIAL COMMITMENT

Quality Control
Every production journey begins with rigorous fabric inspection in our dedicated warehouses.
